code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut have_best = false
mut best_val = 0
mut best_abs = 0
mut cur = ""
mut in_tok = false

while i <= n
  let is_end = i == n
  let b = if is_end
    32
  else
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      32
    end
  end

  let is_space = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13

  if is_space
    if in_tok
      match string.parse_int(cur)
      when Some(v)
        let a = if v < 0
          -v
        else
          v
        end
        if not have_best
          have_best = true
          best_val = v
          best_abs = a
        else if a < best_abs
          best_val = v
          best_abs = a
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      cur = ""
      in_tok = false
    end
  else
    cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    in_tok = true
  end

  i = i + 1
end

println("min_abs=#{best_val}")
